description.overview: One of the rarest spaniel breeds, the Sussex has a unique golden liver coat and a surprisingly deep bark. They're slower-paced but determined hunters.
description.history: The Sussex Spaniel originated in England.
description.temperament: Known for being friendly, cheerful, calm.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their flat or wavy, abundant coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: One of the rarest spaniel breeds, the Sussex has a unique golden liver coat and a surprisingly deep bark. They're slower-paced but determined hunters.
